title: OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NOWIA UNETE OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on and assistance in applying for Oregon Health Plan (OHP), and navigation services such as setting up transportation, interpretation, appointment scheduling, and billing questions. 607 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-7pm Email (541) 245-1625 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 245-1625 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance off Mistletoe Street Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - FAMILIAS ESPECIALES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE LEGAL SERVICES - CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT LEGAL SERVICES - ECO NAVIGATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NOWIA UNETE
